---
title: "Coding with AI"
---

Master the art of providing **context**.

- [Cursor](https://cursor.com/learn/context)
- [202510 LLM Coding Personalities](https://www.sonarsource.com/sem/the-coding-personalities-of-leading-llms/)
- [Anthropic about Context](https://www.anthropic.com/news/context-management)
- [Most devs don’t understand how context windows work](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-uW5-TaVXu4)


## Codebook

![What is a Codebook?](attach/Perceptron03.png)

[Youtube/Shribe: How to create a codebook in qualitative research](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=K8Zq-G3Rg28&t=31s)
